title: Implement Learning Loop MVP: Outcome Ledger + Prompt Variant Attribution
context:
Design is complete and approved at docs/learning-loop-mvp-design.md. This handoff reflects the verified current state as of 2026-02-24.

What already exists (DO NOT rebuild):
- TaskOutcome model at app/models.py:846
- OutcomeLearning model at app/models.py:866
- task_outcomes and outcome_learnings tables (migrated)
- PromptEnhancer FULLY IMPLEMENTED at app/orchestrator/prompt_enhancer.py (not a stub)
- Worker Hook 1 (pre-spawn enhancement) LIVE at app/orchestrator/worker.py:~241
- A/B control group (20%) LIVE at app/orchestrator/worker.py:~234
- Personal learning router at app/routers/learning.py (DO NOT touch — different system)

What's missing and must be built (in order):
1. app/orchestrator/outcome_tracker.py — OutcomeTracker service (CRITICAL)
2. Worker Hook 2 in worker.py — call OutcomeTracker after task completion
3. app/routers/agent_learning.py — POST + GET + PATCH endpoints
4. Register new router in app/main.py (prefix /api/agent-learning)
5. app/orchestrator/learning_batch.py — Daily batch job at 2am ET
6. Engine timer integration in app/orchestrator/engine.py
7. tests/test_agent_learning.py — 12 test cases

Stop after step 4 if time-boxed. Steps 1-4 give a working ledger + read surface.
acceptance: app/orchestrator/outcome_tracker.py exists with OutcomeTracker.track_completion() and OutcomeTracker.record_feedback() — both fail-safe (no exceptions propagate to worker)
worker.py calls OutcomeTracker.track_completion() in _handle_worker_completion() after task status update
WorkerInfo has applied_learning_ids (list[str]) and learning_disabled (bool) fields
app/routers/agent_learning.py exists with POST /api/agent-learning/outcomes, GET /api/agent-learning/summary, PATCH /api/agent-learning/learnings/{id}
New router mounted in app/main.py at prefix /api/agent-learning (separate from /api/learning which is personal plans)
POST /api/agent-learning/outcomes accepts {task_id, outcome, agent_type?, human_feedback?, reason_tags?} and upserts a TaskOutcome row

GET /api/agent-learning/summary returns {generated_at, period_days, totals: {tasks_tracked, success_rate, treatment_success_rate, control_success_rate, lift}, top_failure_patterns, active_learnings, pending_suggestions} with since_days/agent_type/task_category query params
PATCH /api/agent-learning/learnings/{id} accepts {action: approve|reject|edit, lesson_text?} — approve sets is_active=True and confidence=0.5
LEARNING_ENABLED env flag disables all learning code (master switch) without crashing workers

app/orchestrator/learning_batch.py exists — queries last 14 days of failures, groups by agent_type + pattern_name, creates OutcomeLearning rows with is_active=False for patterns with >=3 failures that have no active learning
Batch deactivates learnings with confidence < 0.3 AND failure_count >= 3
Batch job integrated into engine.py timer at 2am ET; last run date persisted to OrchestratorSetting key 'last_learning_batch_date_et'

tests/test_agent_learning.py has 12+ tests covering: track_completion writes row, track_completion never raises, feedback updates outcome, confidence updates on success/failure, auto-deactivate, POST /outcomes, GET /summary (with AB lift), batch creates suggestions, batch skips covered patterns

key_implementation_details.context_hash: SHA256(agent_type + ':' + task_category + ':' + title_first_8_words_lowercase). Groups similar tasks for A/B comparison.
key_implementation_details.success_detection: success=True if task.work_state=='completed' AND review_state not in ('rejected','failed'). Failure if work_state in ('failed','cancelled') OR review_state in ('rejected','failed') OR error_message is set.
key_implementation_details.ab_split: random.random() < float(os.getenv('LEARNING_CONTROL_GROUP_PCT', '0.2')) → learning_disabled=True, skip PromptEnhancer. Hook 1 already handles this. Store learning_disabled flag in TaskOutcome so summary can compare groups.
key_implementation_details.api_prefix: New router uses prefix /api/agent-learning (NOT /api/learning — that prefix belongs to personal learning plans)
key_implementation_details.batch_timer: Same pattern as _memory_maintenance_hour in engine.py. Add _learning_batch_hour_et=2 and _last_learning_batch_date_et. Persist last run to OrchestratorSetting key 'last_learning_batch_date_et'.
key_implementation_details.reason_tags: Standard tags: missing_tests, missing_error_handling, unclear_names, missing_docs, missing_validation, wrong_approach, incomplete, scope_creep, hallucinated_api
key_implementation_details.confidence_model: Success with learnings applied: +0.1 (max 1.0). Failure with learnings applied: -0.15 (min 0.0). Auto-deactivate if confidence < 0.3 AND failure_count >= 3.

files_to_modify: app/orchestrator/worker.py — add applied_learning_ids + learning_disabled to WorkerInfo; add Hook 2 in _handle_worker_completion()
app/orchestrator/engine.py — add 2am ET batch job timer
do_not_touch: app/routers/learning.py — personal learning plans, different system
app/models.py — TaskOutcome and OutcomeLearning already correct, no changes needed
app/orchestrator/prompt_enhancer.py — fully implemented, no changes needed
notes: prompt_enhancer.py is NOT a stub — it is fully implemented. Hook 1 (pre-spawn enhancement) is also already live. Build Hook 2 (post-completion tracking via OutcomeTracker) first, then the API router. See docs/handoffs/learning-loop-mvp-implementation-guide.md for step-by-step instructions.
